'''katama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whaleman|whaleman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-t-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whaleman|whaleman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| katama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kætæmæth|kætæmæth]] || [[word:kætæmæj|kætæmæj]] || [[word:kætæmæsh|kætæmæsh]] || [[word:kætæmæ|kætæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:katatamath|katatamath]] || [[word:katatamaj|katatamaj]] || [[word:katatamash|katatamash]] || [[word:katatama|katatama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:katamath|katamath]] || [[word:katamaj|katamaj]] || [[word:katamash|katamash]] || [[word:katama|katama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:katafmath|katafmath]] || [[word:katafmaj|katafmaj]] || [[word:katafmash|katafmash]] || [[word:katafmaf|katafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:katamatha|katamatha]] || [[word:katamaja|katamaja]] || [[word:katamasha|katamasha]] || [[word:katamaka|katamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:katamath|katamath]] || [[word:katamaj|katamaj]] || [[word:katamash|katamash]] || [[word:katama|katama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:katamathal|katamathal]] || [[word:katamajal|katamajal]] || [[word:katamashal|katamashal]] || [[word:katamakal|katamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:katamathatha|katamathatha]] || [[word:katamajaja|katamajaja]] || [[word:katamashasha|katamashasha]] || [[word:katamaka|katamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:katamathan|katamathan]] || [[word:katamajan|katamajan]] || [[word:katamashan|katamashan]] || [[word:katamakan|katamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:katamathaoro|katamathaoro]] || [[word:katamajaoro|katamajaoro]] || [[word:katamashaoro|katamashaoro]] || [[word:katamakaoro|katamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
